prompt: A surreal black-and-white photograph of a {argument name="horse color" default="white"} horse riding an astronaut on the moon. The astronaut in a bulky {argument name="spacesuit color" default="white"} EVA suit is on all fours on the dusty lunar surface, acting like a mount, while the horse sits upright on the astronaut’s back in a humanlike riding posture with its front legs raised and bent as if holding balance. The horse wears a saddle and bridle with reins draped down toward the astronaut. The astronaut’s helmet has a dark reflective visor, and the figure is facing slightly right with hands and knees pressed into the regolith. The landscape is a barren moon terrain with scattered rocks and gentle low hills, under a completely black sky with no stars visible. Strong directional lighting creates crisp shadows and high contrast, mimicking documentary Apollo-era lunar photography. Center the paired subjects in a medium-wide composition, realistic textures, deadpan absurdity, photorealistic detail, vintage monochrome film look.
translatedPrompt: 一张超现实的黑白照片，画面中一匹 {argument name="horse color" default="white"} 的马骑在月球上的一名宇航员背上。身穿笨重 {argument name="spacesuit color" default="white"} EVA 宇航服的宇航员四肢着地趴在布满尘埃的月球表面，充当坐骑，而马则以类似人类的骑姿直立在宇航员背上，前腿抬起并弯曲，仿佛在保持平衡。马身上配有马鞍和缰绳，缰绳垂向宇航员。宇航员的头盔带有深色反光面罩，人物略微朝右，手膝压在月壤中。背景是荒凉的月球地形，散布着岩石和低矮的丘陵，天空漆黑一片，看不见星星。强烈的定向光营造出清晰的阴影和高对比度，模仿了阿波罗时代的月球纪实摄影风格。将这对主体置于中景构图的中心，呈现逼真的质感、冷幽默的荒诞感、照片级的细节以及复古单色胶片外观。

breakdown.creativeCore: 超现实月球骑手：一张超现实的黑白写实摄影作品，描绘了马骑在宇航员背上的月球场景，非常适合荒诞派艺术或复古太空摄影提示词。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, vintage, documentary]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: high contrast]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
